name: Iggwilv's Horn
entries: You can use an action to blow this horn to cast one of the following spells from it: {@spell Arms of Hadar}, {@spell Fog Cloud}, {@spell Gust of Wind}, or {@spell Web}. If the spell requires a saving throw, the spell save DC is 13.
Once the horn has been used to cast a spell, it can't be used to cast that spell again until the next dawn.
